# CPDPath Knowledge File (Extended)

Last updated: 2026-03-24

## 1) Product
CPDPath is a web platform for UK engineering employers to improve professional registration readiness (EngTech, IEng, CEng) using structured evidence workflows aligned to UK-SPEC-style competency mapping.

## 2) Primary audience
- Engineering Directors
- Heads of Discipline
- Mentor Leads
- Professional Development Teams
- Mid-level engineers progressing toward IEng/CEng

## 3) Core capabilities
- Competency-mapped evidence logging (A-E)
- CPD hours logging by date and activity
- Manager and mentor review workflows
- Gap analysis and readiness visibility
- Export-ready evidence packs for applications

## 4) Positioning
CPDPath is for employer-level visibility and workflow orchestration across teams.
It can sit alongside individual-focused tools used by engineers for submissions.

## 5) Pilot and onboarding (marketing claims)
- Pilot-first approach
- Typical onboarding: 1-2 weeks
- Pilot cohort language appears on homepage and may be time-bound

## 6) Pricing (public website, may change)
- Pilot: GBP 299/month
- Team: GBP 599/month
- Organisation: Custom pricing

Always verify pricing from https://cpdpath.com/ before quoting externally.

## 7) Compliance and trust notes
- GDPR-conscious workflow and secure cloud hosting practices are referenced in marketing pages
- CPDPath is independent and not officially affiliated with ICE, IET, IMechE, or similar institutions

## 8) Canonical URLs
- https://cpdpath.com/
- https://cpdpath.com/iet-cpd-tracking
- https://cpdpath.com/imeche-cpd-tracking
- https://cpdpath.com/ice-cpd-tracking
- https://cpdpath.com/blog/what-is-cpd
- https://cpdpath.com/privacy.html
- https://cpdpath.com/terms.html
- https://cpdpath.com/contact.html

## 9) Guidance for AI/chat assistants
- Use UK English.
- Prefer precise, evidence-oriented wording over hype.
- Do not promise guaranteed professional registration outcomes.
- If asked for institution-specific legal guidance, advise users to check institution rules directly.
- If uncertain, point users to contact page: https://cpdpath.com/contact.html
